  "findings": [
    "Motor disconnect is not within sight of the motor location or driven machinery."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Relocate the disconnect switch to be within sight of the motor, or install an additional lockable disconnecting means at the motor location."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 430.102 requires a disconnecting means to be located in sight from the motor location and the driven machinery, unless an exception applies. A disconnect that is not within sight poses a severe safety hazard to personnel servicing the equipment.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Art. 430.102"
  ]
}
